allModelDesc: Drag models to the configuration on the right
confirmResetConfigDesc: After resetting, the model configuration for this agent will be restored to default
disableTipDesc: After disabling the agent, conversations initiated with this agent will no longer be able to continue, please proceed with caution.
displayPriorityDesc: The larger the value, the higher the priority
downgradeDesc: The downgrade strategy when the model is not available
dynamicModelDesc: Configure dynamic models and downgrade rules
flowModelDesc: Models available in the followed agent,
modeIdDesc: Must match the unique identifier of $t(common:platform.name) mode
modelAlreadyExists: The model already exists in the current group
modelAssignMethodDesc: Set how models are configured for this agent
modelIdPlaceholder: Enter model ID, cannot be modified after creation
pressShiftToInsert: Hold Shift to insert model into group
saveTips: All changes need to be saved to take effect, cancel will restore
textDesc: Used to set the placeholder text in the agent input box, content supports line breaks
textPlaceholder: Enter the placeholder text in the agent input box
tipDesc: After switching, the selected models in the dynamic model will be cleared, are you sure you want to switch?
whiteListDesc: After setting the whitelist, this agent will only be available to whitelisted organizations, and non-whitelisted organizations will not be visible
whiteListPlaceholder: Enter organization ID, multiple organization IDs separated by commas
